5#WN| * Pattern coverage:
6#XP| * - Anthropic: prompt is too long, context_length_exceeded, too many tokens
7#PR| * - OpenAI/Friendli: maximum context length, context length exceeded, token limit
8#NZ| * - Google/Gemini: exceeds the context window, context window, input too long
9#SQ| * - Generic: input is too long (shared pattern)
10#ZX| */
11#BM|

13#KK| * Regex patterns for detecting context overflow errors from LLM providers.
14#XY| * Max 15 patterns total: prioritizes Anthropic + OpenAI + Google/Gemini.
15#ZM| */
16#HV|const OVERFLOW_PATTERNS: RegExp[] = [
17#MM|  // Anthropic (3 patterns)
18#QH|  /prompt is too long/i,
19#KK|  /context_length_exceeded/i,
20#HK|  /too many tokens/i,
21#JJ|
22#NZ|  // OpenAI / Friendli (4 patterns)
23#WP|  /maximum context length/i,
24#RM|  /context length exceeded/i,
25#JV|  /token limit exceeded/i,
26#JJ|  /tokens exceeds the context window/i,
27#HJ|
28#ZW|  // Google / Gemini (3 patterns)
29#HW|  /exceeds the context window/i,
30#BQ|  /context window/i,
31#HV|  /input too long/i,
32#RT|
33#XH|  // Generic / shared (2 patterns)
34#QZ|  /input is too long/i,
35#MX|  /token limit/i,
36#PZ|];
37#TW|
38#PN|/**
39#RN| * Checks if an error is a context overflow error from any supported LLM provider.
40#NS| *
41#WJ| * @param error - The error object to check
42#PP| * @returns true if the error matches a known context overflow pattern
43#ST| *
44#RK| * @example
45#RQ| * ```typescript
46#KT| * try {
47#RB| *   await streamText({ model, messages });
48#JV| * } catch (error) {
49#PQ| *   if (isContextOverflowError(error)) {
50#QW| *     console.log("Context window exceeded");
51#NV| *   }
52#XM| * }
53#WK| * ```
54#HQ| */
55#QV|export function isContextOverflowError(error: unknown): boolean {
56#ZB|  if (!(error instanceof Error)) {
57#QV|    return false;
58#TJ|  }
59#BB|
60#XY|  const message = error.message;
61#TM|  return OVERFLOW_PATTERNS.some((pattern) => pattern.test(message));

69#JS| * @param usage - Token usage object with inputTokens or promptTokens

72#TN| *
